commands.review_summary:
The PR removes one duplicate Unreleased Homebrew LaunchAgent changelog bullet and folds its service-audit wording plus @TurboTheTurtle attribution into the remaining Fixes entry.

Reproducibility: not applicable. for a docs cleanup. Source inspection of current main shows the duplicate changelog entries at CHANGELOG.md:31 and CHANGELOG.md:207, which this PR consolidates.
